title: Visual Ingestion
summary: Simulate passing handwritten class notes into the system and show the extracted text on the right after upload.
uploadNote: This upload is only for the visual design. Press the button to simulate sending in scanned handwritten notes.
examplesCaption: Use the handwritten notes sample below to see how extracted text would appear.
outputCaption: The right panel shows the text interpretation of the uploaded handwritten notes.

exampleInputs.label: Handwritten classnotes
exampleInputs.outputText:
Photosynthesis notes

- Plants use sunlight to make food
- Inputs: water + carbon dioxide + light energy
- Output: glucose + oxygen
- Mostly happens in the chloroplasts
- Chlorophyll helps absorb light
- Important because it stores energy and releases oxygen
